name: Marabou
run: vehicle compile -s spec.vcl -t MarabouQueries -o Marabou.queries/ --network f:fake.onnx

name: TestVerify
run: vehicle verify -s spec.vcl -v TestVerifier --network f:fake.onnx --property underConstrainedVars --verifier-location=testVerifier --verifier-args='sat 'f_X[0]=0.2,f_Y[0]=3.0''
